name: Protocol Tunneling via SSH
description: Detects SSH tunneling used to bypass network controls
query:
// Detect SSH tunneling with port forwarding
// Trigger on SSH with -L, -R, or -D flags
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)ssh\s+.*(-L\s|-R\s|-D\s|-w\s|tunnel)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
